2298550.name: Vampire Ascent
2298550.description:
Vampire Ascent is about discovery, survival, base building and that awesome feeling of ultimate power. It is about figuring out how best to manage and defend your vampire empire. It is about collecting resources, building up your defenses and surviving against hordes of enemies.

Master your Vampire - In this action rogue-lite real-time strategy game, you play as a vampire lord. Turn into a bat to be faster and combine a variety of spells to fit your play style. Kill, grow stronger, and kill some more!

Raise your vampire empire - Gather resources by building mines. Build towers and graveyards to defend your kingdom. Upgrade your buildings and grow your realm.

Defeat endless waves of enemies - Battle against hundreds of enemies, conquer powerful Bosses and explore various skill combinations.

Unique Builds Every Run - Select from a variety of upgrades to create unique and overpowered builds every run. Will you focus on attack speed? Damage? Or something more exotic?

Features
  • Each run is different due to randomization
  • Auto-battler action
  • Explore almost unique active and passive skills
  • Meta progression system
  • Face and defeat powerful Bosses
  • Rogue-lite elements
  • Enjoy instrumental metal background music

Vampire Ascent is currently under pre-production development, this means that a huge part of its design can change.
2298550.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 德语, 意大利语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
*具有完全音频支持的语言
